pageContext.name: Hellboy II: The Golden Army
pageContext.description: 'Indestructible, my a**.'  Sideshow and Vice Press present the unframed Hellboy II: The Golden Army by Drew Struzan!  This 24 x 36' fine art lithograph print is hand-numbered and printed on 300gsm archival paper.  A must-have for fans of Hellboy!
